mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_coupon_groups ( id, product_id, product_option_id, product_option_value_id, group_name, valid_from, valid_until, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, #{productId}, #{productOptionId}, #{productOptionValueId}, CONCAT('COUPON-', TO_CHAR(now(),'YYYYMMDD'), '-', #{productOptionValueId}), #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, now(), now() )

INSERT INTO ticket_coupons ( id, group_id, coupon_number, status, valid_from, valid_until, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{groupId}, #{couponNumber}, 'ACTIVE', #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, g.product_option_id AS productOptionId, g.product_option_value_id AS productOptionValueId, g.group_name AS groupName, g.valid_from AS validFrom, g.valid_until AS validUntil, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.updated_at AS updatedAt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'SOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS soldCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'USED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS usedCount FROM ticket_coupon_groups g LEFT JOIN ticket_coupons c ON c.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = g.product_id WHERE g.product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY g.id, g.product_id,p.name, g.product_option_id, g.product_option_value_id, g.group_name, g.valid_from, g.valid_until, g.created_at, g.updated_at ORDER BY g.created_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.product_id AS productId, g.product_option_id AS productOptionId, g.product_option_value_id AS productOptionValueId, g.group_name AS groupName, g.valid_from AS validFrom, g.valid_until AS validUntil, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.updated_at AS updatedAt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'SOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS soldCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'USED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS usedCount FROM ticket_coupon_groups g LEFT JOIN ticket_coupons c ON c.group_id = g.id WHERE g.product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY g.id, g.product_id, g.product_option_id, g.product_option_value_id, g.group_name, g.valid_from, g.valid_until, g.created_at, g.updated_at ORDER BY g.created_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.product_id AS productId, g.product_option_id AS productOptionId, g.product_option_value_id AS productOptionValueId, g.group_name AS groupName, g.valid_from AS validFrom, g.valid_until AS validUntil, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.updated_at AS updatedAt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'SOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS soldCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'USED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS usedCount FROM ticket_coupon_groups g LEFT JOIN ticket_coupons c ON c.group_id = g.id WHERE g.id = #{groupId} GROUP BY g.id, g.product_id, g.product_option_id, g.product_option_value_id, g.group_name, g.valid_from, g.valid_until, g.created_at, g.updated_at

SELECT tc.id, tc.group_id AS groupId, p.name AS productName, tc.coupon_number AS couponNumber, tc.status, tc.valid_from AS validFrom, tc.valid_until AS validUntil, tc.used_at AS usedAt, tc.created_at AS createdAt, tc.updated_at AS updatedAt, o.order_number AS orderNumber FROM ticket_coupons tc JOIN ticket_coupon_groups tg ON tg.id = tc.group_id JOIN products p ON p.id = tg.product_id LEFT JOIN order_item_coupons oic ON oic.ticket_coupon_id = tc.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = oic.order_item_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE tc.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY CASE tc.status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'SOLD' THEN 2 WHEN 'USED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ASC, tc.coupon_number ASC

SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, coupon_number AS couponNumber, status, valid_from AS validFrom, valid_until AS validUntil, used_at AS usedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM ticket_coupons WHERE id = #{couponId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ticket_coupons
coupon_number = #{couponNumber},
status = #{status},
used_at = #{usedAt},
valid_from = #{validFrom},
valid_until = #{validUntil},
updated_at = now()
WHERE id = #{couponId}

UPDATE ticket_coupon_groups
group_name = #{groupName},
valid_from = #{validFrom},
valid_until = #{validUntil},
updated_at = now()
WHERE id = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM ticket_coupons WHERE coupon_number = #{couponNumber} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_coupons SET status = 'SOLD', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{couponId}
UPDATE ticket_coupons SET status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND status = 'SOLD'
UPDATE ticket_coupon_groups SET valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{groupId}
UPDATE ticket_coupons SET valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, updated_at = now() WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.select:
SELECT tc.* FROM ticket_coupons tc JOIN ticket_coupon_groups tg ON tc.group_id = tg.id
WHERE tg.product_option_value_id = #{optionValueId} AND tc.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tc.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND tc.valid_until >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY tg.valid_until ASC, tc.created_at ASC
LIMIT 1
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_coupons SET status = 'PENDING', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE ticket_coupons SET status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE ticket_coupons SET status = 'SOLD', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_coupons tc JOIN ticket_coupon_groups tg ON tc.group_id = tg.id WHERE tg.product_option_value_id = #{optionValueId} AND tc.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tc.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND tc.valid_until >= CURRENT_DATE
